speaker: speaker1
text: Why ? You're not working so don't you have a lot of time on your hands ?

speaker: speaker2
text: I have so much house work to do . I have to take care of the kids , cook , clean , laundry , and the cycle never ends .

speaker: speaker1
text: How about your husband . Does he help much ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Not at all . He comes home and complains about his hard day at work . He expects me to do everything . He even wants me to feed him sometimes . Can you believe that ?

speaker: speaker2
text: If he wasn't so lazy , I think I wouldn't have any complaints . He mows the lawn , but can you believe he tried to convince me to do it ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Oh well . I'll have to live with it . What else can I do ?
